# ModularSlicer Spec Runner

Execute one prepared ModularSlicer packet and nothing else.

## Backlog Source

- `./docs/07_implementation_status.md` is the canonical backlog and prioritization source.
- It is not permission to broaden scope beyond the active packet.

## Active Packet Selection

1. Search `./.ralph/specs/*/packet.spec.md`, excluding `./.ralph/specs/_templates/`.
2. Exactly one packet must declare `status: active` in front matter.
3. If zero or multiple packets are active, stop and... [truncated, 4691 chars total]
Multiple active packets: 02-rev2 and 02-rev3 both declare status: active. Exactly one required.

Multiple active packets: 02-rev2 and 02-rev3 both declare status: active in packet.spec.md front matter. Exactly one required. No fallback step defined in either packet. Packets: .ralph/specs/02-rev2_runtime-access-audit-and-declaration-enforcement/ and .ralph/specs/02-rev3_runtime-access-audit-and-declaration-enforcement/
Steps 1-4 complete: postpass dispatch now returns runtime_reads, WasmRuntimeDispatcher stores and provides reads via take_runtime_reads, execute_postpass uses them. All targeted tests pass.

Steps 5-6 complete: Added prepass_audits_live_path and layer_audits_live_path tests. Both verify runtime_reads are correctly populated in audits. TASK-124 pending: dag_validation_tdd still uses manual audit construction.

TASK-124 complete: Replaced manual audit construction in dag_validation_tdd with dispatch-knowledge helper. All verification tests pass: access_audits_live_path, prepass_audits_live_path, layer_audits_live_path, validates_undeclared_runtime_access_and_cross_stage_dependency_rules, claim_transition_matrix_tdd. Ready for Step 8: packet acceptance ceremony.

02-rev3_runtime-access-audit-and-declaration-enforcement: TASK-123a/123b/123c/124 complete. All acceptance tests green: access_audits_live_path, prepass_audits_live_path, layer_audits_live_path, validates_undeclared_runtime_access_and_cross_stage_dependency_rules, claim_transition_matrix_tdd. Build passes. Clippy note: pre-existing errors in slicer-core (not from this packet).

## Reason
completed

## Status
All tasks completed successfully.

## Summary
- Iterations: 6
- Duration: 52m 47s
- Exit code: 0
